title: Combat Balance
description: Change the attribute values of any item, tag or entity.
body:
A lightweight modpack utility to override the attribute values of weapons, armors and entities.

## Features
- Modify/Add values on weapons, armors and entities.
- Support for modded attributes.
- Support for modifying entire tags.
- Simple TOML configuration.
- Reload the configuration using /reload, no restart needed.

## Example Configuration
![Example Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b33b178ff8083e98ef891176aa89f144751b5589.png)

_Credits to Caverns & Chasms for the modded attributes showcased in screenshots._
